title: NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS WORLD SERVICES NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 12-step program offering support groups for individuals who would like to maintain a drug-free lifestyle. Does not focus on any particular drug and makes no distinction between alcohol and drugs. The website provides a search tool to find local meetings. Website Van Nuys, CA 91409 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Drug Use Disorder Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS WORLD SERVICES
